name: Jicama Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small red bell pepper, seeded and julienne
1/2 small yellow bell pepper, seeded and julienne
1/2 small zucchini (green part only), cut julienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vegetables, oil, lime juice, salt, and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
2. Toss well to mix.
3. May be prepared several hours ahead and refrigerated. In that case, omit salt until almost ready to serve.
4. Serve as a garnish with Lobster Tacos (or other Southwestern dishes).
